send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

I had an issue with an order and I haven't been able to get our response
*a response

Fashion Nova: I'm sorry about that! Did you submit an inquiry through this link? - http://sms.fashionnova.com/ajzRXKgH6Wsc If so, our team is doing everything to respond to each inquiry promptly. They should follow up with you in no time! Please check your spam and promo folders as well, as our emails sometimes end up there. Can you also tell me what the issue is?
I ordered size 6 boots and they sent size 8 but it wouldn't let me create a return

Fashion Nova: I'm so sorry to hear that. Can you please let me know when you placed the order and what the order number is? I'm afraid I'm not seeing boots on your most recent order. If it happens that it's been past 30 days, I'm afraid it's no longer returnable. You can visit http://sms.fashionnova.com/an-ttfmx5dzk for the latest info about returns. Hope this info helps!
I tried to make the return on time, but it just said the item was not eligible for return
I understand if it's a final sale, but I got sent the wrong size
I just want the right size
Fashion Nova: Thank you for the info, and I understand. Please contact us using the link provided to have this sorted out: http://sms.fashionnova.com/aInBRd7zml6N Our team is happy to help!
I get this message:
Your order was delivered over 14 days ago, and regretably, we cannot help you with wrong items reported outside this timeframe.
But I've been trying, there was just no direct contact information

Fashion Nova: Yes, I'm really sorry about that. Please note that if your order was delivered over 14 days ago, regrettably, we cannot help you with damage/broken/incorrect reported outside this time frame. We apologize for the inconvenience. Let me know if there's anything else I can assist you with today, happy to help.
The box says size 6.... when I wanted to wear them I put them on and they were too big...I saw then that the actual boots are size 8
I attempted to make the return and it didn't let me
Template used: "Damaged/broken item"; last updated: 2026-02-12 20:13:55.426

Fashion Nova: I'm really sorry for the inconvenience. Please do not send the wrong items through the return portal. Instead, contact Customer Care through our Fashion Nova Help Center: http://sms.fashionnova.com/a4yQZqJJBr1r We will verify the issue, send a complimentary label if needed, and refund the item to your original payment method. Please note that 
if your order was delivered over 14 days ago, regrettably, we cannot help you with damage reported outside this time frame.
